name: sn2-chloride_irc
prompt: Run the intrinsic-reaction-coordinate task on the sn2-chloride transition-state geometry using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase with charge -1. Report the forward and reverse endpoint energies, the energy drops in each direction, and whether the two endpoints are distinct. State the method and charge used. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
